## Meeting Purpose

[Bi-weekly GrowthX all-hands meeting to introduce new hires, share company updates, and discuss new customers and pipeline deals.](https://fathom.video/share/XpYnziQFesVsQQsK3bsyxJcdy_xiFp3x?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Four new hires introduced: Etisham (Managing Editor), George Mayne (Designer), Jo (Managing Editor), and Bianca (Go-to-Market/Growth)](https://fathom.video/share/XpYnziQFesVsQQsK3bsyxJcdy_xiFp3x?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [Audit Week planned for next week to transition from AirOps to Atlas platform and allow teams to adjust to new workflows](https://fathom.video/share/XpYnziQFesVsQQsK3bsyxJcdy_xiFp3x?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [Several new high-value customers onboarded, including Augment Code, Town.com, Airbyte, and Engine.com](https://fathom.video/share/XpYnziQFesVsQQsK3bsyxJcdy_xiFp3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
  - [Strong pipeline of potential deals with notable companies like Okta, Sennawan, and Outreach](https://fathom.video/share/XpYnziQFesVsQQsK3bsyxJcdy_xiFp3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)

## Topics

### New Hire Introductions

  - [Etisham Hussain: Managing Editor from Karachi, Pakistan; 10+ years in content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/XpYnziQFesVsQQsK3bsyxJcdy_xiFp3x?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [George Mayne Lourens: Designer with 8+ years experience, previously at Pitch; based in Amsterdam](https://fathom.video/share/XpYnziQFesVsQQsK3bsyxJcdy_xiFp3x?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [Joanna Kaminska: Managing Editor based in Lisbon; 5+ years SaaS content marketing experience](https://fathom.video/share/XpYnziQFesVsQQsK3bsyxJcdy_xiFp3x?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Bianca Nieves: Go-to-Market/Growth expert with extensive startup experience across various stages](https://fathom.video/share/XpYnziQFesVsQQsK3bsyxJcdy_xiFp3x?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)

### Company Announcements

  - [Dave transitioning to a new role supporting all pods and strategy sprints, leveraging his e-commerce and technical SEO expertise](https://fathom.video/share/XpYnziQFesVsQQsK3bsyxJcdy_xiFp3x?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Audit Week planned for next week:](https://fathom.video/share/XpYnziQFesVsQQsK3bsyxJcdy_xiFp3x?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
      - [Transition from AirOps to Atlas platform](https://fathom.video/share/XpYnziQFesVsQQsK3bsyxJcdy_xiFp3x?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
      - [Pause on publishing for healthy accounts](https://fathom.video/share/XpYnziQFesVsQQsK3bsyxJcdy_xiFp3x?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
      - [Focus on training, system testing, and strategic planning](https://fathom.video/share/XpYnziQFesVsQQsK3bsyxJcdy_xiFp3x?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
      - [Marcel conducting a listening tour for client feedback](https://fathom.video/share/XpYnziQFesVsQQsK3bsyxJcdy_xiFp3x?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)

### New Customers and Deals

  - [Augment Code: $30,000 strategy sprint; launched codelibrary.ai site](https://fathom.video/share/XpYnziQFesVsQQsK3bsyxJcdy_xiFp3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [Town.com: Founded by ex-Plaid CTO John Dennis; raised $20M quickly](https://fathom.video/share/XpYnziQFesVsQQsK3bsyxJcdy_xiFp3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)
  - [Airbyte: Existing customer expanding engagement](https://fathom.video/share/XpYnziQFesVsQQsK3bsyxJcdy_xiFp3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
  - [Engine.com: Transitioning from competitor Graphite; focus on group bookings and new product launches](https://fathom.video/share/XpYnziQFesVsQQsK3bsyxJcdy_xiFp3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
  - [Biologica: B2C women's health supplements brand in stealth mode](https://fathom.video/share/XpYnziQFesVsQQsK3bsyxJcdy_xiFp3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)

### Pipeline Overview

  - [Several potential high-profile deals in progress (e.g., Okta, Sennawan, Outreach)](https://fathom.video/share/XpYnziQFesVsQQsK3bsyxJcdy_xiFp3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)
  - [Exploring e-commerce opportunities with new programmatic capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/XpYnziQFesVsQQsK3bsyxJcdy_xiFp3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)
  - [Strategy sprint model gaining traction, positioned as a mutual evaluation period](https://fathom.video/share/XpYnziQFesVsQQsK3bsyxJcdy_xiFp3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1910.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andy to send follow-up information on Audit Week expectations and communication](https://fathom.video/share/XpYnziQFesVsQQsK3bsyxJcdy_xiFp3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1968.0)
